settings.heading: From Our Land to Your Hands
settings.subheading: Small-batch artisan honey, beeswax goods, and herbal remedies crafted with care on our Texas farm. Every product tells a story of land, bees, and tradition.

settings.subtitle: What We Make
settings.title: Our Products
settings.description: Every jar, candle, and tin starts with what we grow and harvest right here on the farm. Our honey and beeswax form the foundation of a product line rooted in self-sufficiency.

settings.text: Travis County Farm started with a single beehive and a belief that the best things come from working with the land, not against it. What began as raw honey quickly grew into a full line of handcrafted goods - each one connected back to what we grow and harvest right here in Travis County, Texas.
Our honey feeds into our elderberry syrup. Our beeswax becomes candles and healing salves. Every product is part of a vertically integrated cycle that starts and ends on the farm.

settings.heading: Locally Sourced
settings.text: Everything starts on our land in Travis County

settings.heading: Small Batch
settings.text: Handcrafted in limited quantities for quality

settings.heading: Chemical Free
settings.text: No additives, no shortcuts, just nature

settings.heading: Join the TCF Family
settings.description: Be the first to know when our products launch. Get farm updates, seasonal offerings, and exclusive early access.
